category: Personal Leave No Loss of Pay
reason:
Hi Sir I would like to request leave on 10th and 11th June to attend my brother’s wedding (my mother’s own sister’s son), which will be taking place in Anantapur.

Additionally, I would like to inform you in advance that I may require leave on 12th June as my parents have invited a prospective alliance to visit our home. At this moment, I am not sure sir  whether the visit will take place on that day, but I wanted to keep you informed beforehand. If they do visit, I may need an additional day of leave.

I kindly request you to approve my leave. I assure you that this absence will not impact my performance or targets. I will make every effort to compensate for the time away by putting in extra work and compensate by being available on other days and ensuring that I achieve the targets assigned to me.
Kindly accept this leave sir, Il never disappoint you this time for sure sir
